name: ndcourts
description: Search North Dakota Supreme Court opinions (1889–present) via a remote MCP server.
long_description:
Connects Claude Desktop to a self-hosted ndcourts-mcp endpoint over Streamable HTTP with HTTP Basic Auth. The bundle ships `mcp-remote` inside the extension and invokes it with an absolute path, so it works regardless of whether `npx` is on the spawned Node process's PATH. Prompts for the server URL and credentials at install time.

Provides 22 tools for opinion lookup, full-text search, citation tracing, citing-opinion lists, and more.

Note: the password field is stored as plaintext in the Claude Extensions Settings file (mode 0600, user-only readable). This is a workaround for a Claude Desktop bug where `sensitive: true` fields are stored encrypted but passed to env vars without decryption.

url.title: Server URL
url.description: The full URL of the ndcourts MCP endpoint, ending in /mcp.

password.title: Password
password.description: Password shared via secure channel. (Stored in plaintext in the user-only-readable settings file — workaround for a Claude Desktop bug with sensitive fields.)
